user.title: NeoVac MyEnergy Login
user.description: Enter your NeoVac MyEnergy account credentials.

select_unit.title: Select Usage Unit
select_unit.description: Select the usage unit (metering point) you want to monitor.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate NeoVac MyEnergy
reauth_confirm.description: Your NeoVac credentials have expired. Please re-enter them.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to NeoVac servers
error.no_usage_units: No usage units found for this account

abort.already_configured: This usage unit is already configured

data_description.scan_interval_electricity: How often to fetch electricity consumption data. Electricity meters update in 15-minute intervals.
data_description.scan_interval_other: How often to fetch water, heating, and cooling consumption data. These meters typically update hourly.
data_description.debug_logging: Log detailed information about fetched values and computation decisions to the Home Assistant log.
